svg.text: CHARACTER REFERENCE SHEET — THE KING'S REGRET
• Carved wood or gold — warm, sacred material
• Act 1: sits quietly on game board, barely noticed
• Act 2: falls as Taleju fades — weighted, intentional
• Act 3: King stares at the empty space where it was
• Act 4: Child carries it — full circle, renewed
"The token is not magic — it is meaning."
• Traditional Kumari dress: deep crimson with gold
• Formal Kumari kohl makeup — NOT frightening
• Glow: softer than Taleju's — warm, not blinding
• NEVER sexualized — pure, protected framing only
• Token held with both hands, at chest level
Arc: silent entrance → hope given → peace restored
